title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
